overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a continuous vertical ascent through a dense futuristic metropolis. The player rises from dark industrial lower levels through neon-lit commercial canyons toward towering skyscrapers above, characterized by heavy atmospheric haze, volumetric lighting, and cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance shaft between concrete buildings

agents.ego_description: ascending vertically through a narrow industrial gap between buildings, passing large pipes and metal structures

entered.detail: large industrial pipes with orange and blue coloring running horizontally across the shaft
dark concrete building walls with industrial textures and maintenance access panels
metal walkway grating visible across the shaft below
deep vertical shaft descending into darkness with hazy atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view ascending through a dark, narrow industrial shaft. Large orange and blue pipes run along the canyon walls, with metal walkways visible across the gap. The atmosphere is thick with haze and dimly lit, creating a claustrophobic industrial environment deep within the city structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial canyon with elevated monorail crossing and neon signage

events.description: passing under an elevated monorail track and glass-enclosed pedestrian bridge
neon signs and digital billboards become visible on building facades, shifting from industrial to commercial aesthetic

agents.ego_description: continuing upward ascent through the building canyon, passing commercial signage and infrastructure

entered.detail: elevated monorail track spanning the gap between buildings with glass enclosure
transparent pedestrian walkway connecting the two sides of the building canyon
illuminated green neon signage mounted on the building facade
large digital advertising screens displaying commercial content
grid-patterned windows on the commercial building facade

segments.scene_description: The ascent continues past an elevated monorail track and glass pedestrian bridge. The environment transitions from industrial to commercial, with bright neon signs and digital billboards appearing on the building facades. God rays begin to filter down through the haze as the camera rises higher through the canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper city summit with floating structures and bright skylight

events.description: floating purple spherical objects come into view near the towering structure above
camera tilts upward to focus on the towering spire as game HUD interface becomes visible

agents.ego_description: ascending toward the towering skyscraper summit, approaching floating structures and bright light above

entered.detail: glowing purple spherical objects floating in the air near the tower structure
massive futuristic tower spire rising above with complex architectural details
intense bright light source from the sky above creating volumetric god rays
distant view of the city streets far below through the haze

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the ascent reaching the upper levels of the city, with intense backlighting from the sky above. Floating purple spherical objects hover near a massive tower spire. The camera tilts upward to reveal the towering structures above, and a game HUD appears in the corner indicating the gameplay interface. The view opens to show the city sprawl far below through the atmospheric haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vertical ascent that transforms from a claustrophobic industrial shaft into a vast, neon-lit urban expanse. It begins by rising through a dark, narrow canyon lined with orange and blue pipes and metal walkways shrouded in thick haze. As the camera climbs, the industrial surroundings give way to a commercial district where bright neon signs and digital billboards emerge, and volumetric god rays begin to filter through the atmosphere. The scene then opens further as the ascent passes an elevated monorail and glass bridges, finally reaching the upper levels where floating purple spheres hover near a massive tower spire. The camera tilts upward toward the intense backlighting of the sky, revealing the sprawling city far below through the lingering haze as a game HUD appears in the corner.
